news.t: Better Vanguard ETF? Vanguard Pacific (VPL) or Vanguard Europe (VGK)

holdings.infoBox: VPL is an equity ETF with a total of 2335 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 7.64%, SK hynix at 6.51%, BHP Group at 1.69%, Slbbh1142 at 1.68%, and Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group at 1.60%.

overview.description: The Vanguard FTSE Pacific ETF (VPL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of securities in the developed markets of the Asia-Pacific region. VPL was launched on Mar 4, 2005 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: FTSE Developed Asia Pacific Index All Cap Net Tax (US RIC) Index

data.title: Better Vanguard ETF? Vanguard Pacific (VPL) or Vanguard Europe (VGK)
data.text: Amid volatile global markets, investors face a tough challenge in selecting which ETF (exchange-traded fund) best suits their financial goals. Europe grapples with geopolitical headwinds, the Pacific ...
